name: av_3174082c-b0a4-44f8-87c0-b2eead522d75
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, through the windshield, onto an urban street scene. The car is positioned under a concrete overpass, with the dashboard visible at the bottom of the frame. The road ahead is marked with a "STOP" sign, bike lane markings, and pedestrian crosswalks painted in white stripes. Surrounding the intersection are modern high-rise buildings, including one with a glass facade and another with a red brick exterior. To the left, there's a smaller, low-rise building with a white wall and some greenery. An all-way stop sign stands prominently on the right side of the intersection, with a no-left-turn sign above it, near a sidewalk bordered by large potted plants. The sky above is partly cloudy, suggesting a daytime setting with diffused sunlight.  As the video progresses, the car continues its journey forward, emerging from beneath the overpass and approaching the intersection. The camera remains stationary, capturing the steady movement of the vehicle as it navigates the empty streets. The surrounding environment remains unchanged, with the high-rise buildings, stop sign, and pedestrian crosswalks remaining static throughout the sequence. When the video starts, a black SUV is visible moving towards the right of the frame on the road across the intersection. By the final frame, the ego vehicle has moved closer to the intersection, slowing down, gradually coming to a stop, occluding the painted "STOP" sign, passing the all-way stop sign on the right, and crosswalks are partially visible, with modern buildings continuing to frame the scene, at the t-intersection.
